skills.name: xc8-build
skills.description: Build firmware with the repo-local Python XC8 build script. The script stays generic by defaulting to SCMCU project-file metadata, while still allowing explicit overrides for chip, source files, and image prefix when an agent or user needs to drive a custom build. Keep artifacts under build/xc8/<build-name>/ and inspect cmscerr.err plus map output for ROM/RAM usage, warnings, and function sizes. Use when the user asks to compile, rebuild, verify code size, inspect map output, or produce a named build output set.
skills.short_description: Build firmware and inspect ROM/RAM/map output

interface.short_description: Build firmware and inspect ROM/RAM/map output
interface.default_prompt: Use $xc8-build to run the repo-local XC8 build flow, inspect build status, and report ROM/RAM usage plus key artifacts.

skills.name: tektronix-scope
skills.description: Remote-control Tektronix oscilloscopes over VISA/SCPI and capture live waveform data to local files for debugging. Use when Codex needs to discover a Tek scope, connect by USB or TCPIP resource string, run direct SCPI queries or writes, inspect instrument state non-invasively, or export waveform samples to CSV and JSON for AI-assisted analysis.
skills.short_description: Control Tek scopes and capture waveform data

interface.short_description: Control Tek scopes and capture waveform data
interface.default_prompt: Use $tektronix-scope to connect to a Tektronix oscilloscope, query its state, and capture a waveform to CSV.
